step_rationale: Ferroptosis regulator; altered expression reflects ischemic cardiomyocyte amino-acid imbalance and death.
mechanism: SLC1A5 dysregulation in AMI impairs glutamate/cystine exchange, accelerating ferroptotic cardiomyocyte death.

references.title: Identification and characterization of novel ferroptosis-related genes in acute myocardial infarction.
